_meta.purpose: Demo brief — Alpine Harvest Organic Trail Mix, APAC market. Tropical Southeast Asian aesthetic with mango coconut variant.
_meta.data_origin: Updated 2026-03-20: Changed from matcha green tea to mango coconut for clearer trail mix category signaling.

cultural_context: Southeast Asian tropical vibrancy. Warm golden-orange and deep green palette with mango, coconut palm, and tropical foliage motifs. Fresh, energetic, and natural. Communicates adventure snacking and natural tropical ingredients.

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Crisp macadamia nuts, cashews, dried pineapple, and toasted coconut flakes for tropical trail energy

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Sun-dried mango chunks, toasted coconut chips, macadamia nuts, and candied ginger — Southeast Asia in every handful

audience: active urban consumers 22-38 in Southeast Asia, Australia, and South Korea seeking natural adventure snacks
